name: DEEP DARK
short_description: DEEP DARK IS A LINEAR STORY GAME ABOUT BEING STRANDED ALONE IN DEEP SPACE, AT THE END OF TIME. YOU FIND YOURSELF ISOLATED, WHERE NO ONE HEARS YOU CRY.
detailed_description:
DEEP DARK IS A LINEAR STORY GAME ABOUT BEING STRANDED ALONE IN DEEP SPACE, AT THE END OF TIME. YOU FIND YOURSELF ISOLATED, WHERE NO ONE HEARS YOU CRY.

WILL YOU FIND THE SEQUENCE OF BUTTONS THAT WILL SAVE YOU? OR WILL YOU ROT IN SPACE FOREVER?

FIND A WAY OUT

THERE'S ONLY ONE WAY OUT OF THIS SITUATION; FIND THE SEQUENCE OF BUTTONS ON THE CONTROL PANEL THAT ALLOWS YOU TO ESCAPE.

DON'T LOSE YOUR MIND

SPENDING TOO MUCH TIME IN ISOLATION CAN DAMAGE YOUR MIND. WILL YOU LOSE YOURS? OR WILL YOU FIND THE SEQUENCE IN TIME?

MOVE ON

EXPERIENCE A STORY ABOUT A PERSON DEALING WITH TRAGEDY, AND HOW IT DEVELOPS IN HIS MIND.
